title: Square Root and Factorial
description: Import the math module. Use **math.sqrt()** to calculate the square root of 81 and **math.factorial()** to calculate the factorial of 5. Print both results separated by a space (sqrt first, then factorial).
starter_code:
# Import the math module
# Calculate and print sqrt(81) and factorial(5)

code_requirements.fail_message: Import the math module with 'import math'.

code_requirements.description: Uses math.sqrt() to calculate a square root
code_requirements.fail_message: Use math.sqrt(81) to calculate the square root instead of hardcoding 9.0.

code_requirements.description: Uses math.factorial() to calculate a factorial
code_requirements.fail_message: Use math.factorial(5) to calculate the factorial instead of hardcoding 120.

hints: Print both in one line: print(math.sqrt(81), math.factorial(5))
